useCases.title: Log Figma version history in Notion
useCases.description: Each time a Figma version is published, GAIA appends an entry to the design history table on the Notion page. Teams maintain a clear design changelog inside their documentation.

howItWorks.step: Connect Figma and Notion to GAIA
howItWorks.description: Authorize GAIA with your Figma account and Notion workspace. GAIA maps your Figma projects to the corresponding Notion databases.

howItWorks.step: Configure embedding rules and status mappings
howItWorks.description: Define which Figma files embed in which Notion pages and how Figma status tags map to Notion database properties. GAIA maintains these links automatically.

howItWorks.step: GAIA automates design-to-documentation sync
howItWorks.description: Figma updates flow into Notion in real time. Designs are embedded live, statuses are updated, and version history is logged without manual intervention.

faqs.question: Are Figma embeds in Notion live or static images?
faqs.answer: GAIA uses Figma's embed URL to insert live, interactive embeds in Notion. Viewers see the current design and can navigate frames directly within the Notion page.

faqs.question: Can GAIA sync Figma comments to Notion?
faqs.answer: Yes. Figma comment threads can be mirrored to a comments section of the Notion page, giving non-Figma users visibility into design feedback without needing a Figma account.

faqs.question: Does this work with Figma branches?
faqs.answer: GAIA can track specific Figma branches and reflect branch status in Notion. When a branch is merged, the Notion page status updates accordingly.

figma-asana.tagline: Link Figma design deliverables to Asana tasks automatically
figma-asana.metaTitle: Figma + Asana Automation - Design Handoffs in Task Management | GAIA
figma-asana.metaDescription: Connect Figma and Asana with GAIA. Link Figma design files to Asana tasks, update task status when designs are ready, and streamline design-to-development handoffs.
figma-asana.intro:
Design handoffs are a perennial pain point between design and engineering teams. Designers mark a Figma file ready, but the corresponding Asana task for the engineer remains untouched. Engineers start development with no indication that the design has been finalized, or they build from an outdated version.

GAIA connects Figma and Asana to automate the handoff. When a Figma design moves to 'Ready for Development,' the linked Asana task is updated, the design file is attached, and the assignee is notified. The design-to-development handoff happens automatically with zero manual coordination.

useCases.title: Auto-update Asana tasks when designs are ready
useCases.description: When a Figma frame is tagged 'Ready for Development,' GAIA updates the linked Asana task status and notifies the assigned engineer. Handoffs are instant and automatic.

useCases.title: Attach Figma file links to Asana tasks
useCases.description: When a Figma file is created for a feature, GAIA attaches the Figma link to the corresponding Asana task. Engineers always have direct access to the latest designs from the task.

useCases.title: Create Asana tasks from Figma comment action items
useCases.description: When a comment in Figma is marked as a revision request, GAIA creates an Asana task for the designer with the comment text and frame link. No revision gets lost in comment threads.

useCases.title: Design milestone progress in Asana
useCases.description: As Figma frames progress through design stages, GAIA updates the Asana project milestone completion percentage. Project managers see design progress in their existing tool.

howItWorks.step: Connect Figma and Asana to GAIA
howItWorks.description: Authorize GAIA with your Figma account and Asana workspace. GAIA links your Figma projects to their corresponding Asana projects.

howItWorks.step: Map Figma status tags to Asana task states
howItWorks.description: Define how Figma status labels correspond to Asana task sections and custom fields. GAIA translates design workflow stages into project management language.

howItWorks.step: GAIA automates design handoffs and task updates
howItWorks.description: Figma status changes trigger Asana task updates, file attachments, and assignee notifications. Handoffs are complete before anyone sends a single message.

faqs.question: How does GAIA know which Figma file corresponds to which Asana task?
faqs.answer: You configure the mapping during setup by linking Figma projects to Asana projects. GAIA then matches files and frames to tasks based on naming conventions or custom tags you define.

faqs.question: Can GAIA handle multiple design revisions on the same Asana task?
faqs.answer: Yes. Each time a new Figma version is published, GAIA appends a comment to the Asana task with the version number and link. The full revision history is visible on the task.

faqs.question: Does GAIA work with Figma components and libraries?
faqs.answer: GAIA focuses on Figma files and frames rather than component libraries. Handoff automation applies to design files associated with specific product features in Asana.

stripe-slack.tagline: Get payment alerts, MRR updates, and churn notifications in Slack
stripe-slack.metaTitle: Stripe + Slack Automation - Revenue Alerts in Team Chat | GAIA
stripe-slack.metaDescription: Connect Stripe and Slack with GAIA. Post payment notifications, MRR milestones, failed charge alerts, and churn warnings to Slack channels automatically.
stripe-slack.intro:
Revenue events happen in Stripe but the team learns about them through manual dashboard checks or end-of-month reports. Failed payments go unnoticed for days, churn happens silently, and MRR milestones are celebrated after the fact instead of in real time when the energy is highest.

GAIA connects Stripe to Slack so every meaningful revenue event surfaces immediately in the right channel. New subscriptions ring the virtual sales bell, failed charges alert the support team instantly, and MRR milestone posts keep the whole company motivated and informed without anyone opening the Stripe dashboard.

useCases.title: New subscription and payment notifications
useCases.description: Every new Stripe subscription triggers a Slack message in the sales channel with the customer name and plan. The team celebrates wins in real time as they happen.

useCases.title: Failed payment alerts for immediate recovery
useCases.description: Failed charges post an instant Slack alert to the support channel with the customer, amount, and failure reason. Recovery outreach begins within minutes instead of days.

useCases.title: MRR milestone announcements
useCases.description: When MRR crosses a milestone threshold, GAIA posts a company-wide Slack announcement. Revenue milestones are celebrated the moment they are achieved.

useCases.title: Churn and cancellation alerts
useCases.description: Subscription cancellations trigger a Slack alert to the customer success team with churn reason if available. Retention outreach can begin immediately after a cancellation.

howItWorks.step: Connect Stripe and Slack to GAIA
howItWorks.description: Authorize GAIA with your Stripe account and Slack workspace. GAIA listens to Stripe webhook events and routes them to your configured channels.

howItWorks.step: Configure event types and channel routing
howItWorks.description: Choose which Stripe events post to which Slack channels and set thresholds for MRR milestone alerts. GAIA gives you per-event control over routing.

howItWorks.step: GAIA automates revenue event notifications
howItWorks.description: Stripe events matching your rules are formatted into clear Slack messages with relevant customer and amount details posted in real time.

faqs.question: Can I set custom MRR milestone thresholds?
faqs.answer: Yes. You configure any MRR values that should trigger a Slack announcement. GAIA tracks cumulative MRR and posts when your defined thresholds are crossed.

faqs.question: Does GAIA expose sensitive customer data in Slack messages?
faqs.answer: GAIA lets you control which data fields appear in Slack notifications. You can include customer name and amount while omitting payment method details to protect sensitive information.

faqs.question: Can GAIA send Stripe alerts to different Slack channels by plan type?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can route enterprise plan events to one channel and startup plan events to another. GAIA supports conditional routing based on Stripe metadata fields.

stripe-notion.tagline: Build revenue dashboards and track payments inside Notion databases
stripe-notion.metaTitle: Stripe + Notion Automation - Revenue Data in Your Docs | GAIA
stripe-notion.metaDescription: Connect Stripe and Notion with GAIA. Sync Stripe payment data to Notion databases, build revenue dashboards, and track subscriptions alongside your business documentation.
stripe-notion.intro:
Business operators often want revenue data alongside their strategy documents, customer notes, and planning databases in Notion, but Stripe data is locked inside the Stripe dashboard. Building manual revenue reports in Notion means exporting CSVs and copy-pasting numbers that are outdated the moment they are entered.

GAIA connects Stripe to Notion so revenue data flows automatically into your Notion databases. New subscriptions create records in your customer database, payment events update revenue tracking tables, and MRR figures refresh daily. Your Notion workspace becomes a live business intelligence hub without any manual data entry.

useCases.title: Auto-create customer records from Stripe subscriptions
useCases.description: When a new Stripe subscription is created, GAIA adds a record to your Notion customer database with plan, MRR contribution, and start date. Your CRM stays current automatically.

useCases.title: Live MRR and revenue tracking in Notion
useCases.description: GAIA updates a Notion revenue dashboard daily with current MRR, new revenue, and churn figures pulled from Stripe. Leadership has live revenue metrics without touching the Stripe dashboard.

useCases.title: Payment event log in Notion
useCases.description: Successful payments and failed charges are logged to a Notion database with date, customer, and amount. Finance teams have a searchable, filterable payment history inside Notion.

useCases.title: Subscription change tracking
useCases.description: Upgrades, downgrades, and cancellations in Stripe trigger updates to the Notion customer record. The subscription history for every customer is always current in your Notion CRM.

howItWorks.step: Connect Stripe and Notion to GAIA
howItWorks.description: Authorize GAIA with your Stripe account and Notion workspace. GAIA maps Stripe event types to your Notion database schemas.

howItWorks.step: Configure Notion database mappings
howItWorks.description: Define which Notion databases receive customer records, payment logs, and revenue metrics. GAIA uses your existing database properties to populate data correctly.

howItWorks.step: GAIA automates Stripe-to-Notion data sync
howItWorks.description: Stripe events create and update Notion records in real time. Revenue data, customer status, and payment history stay current without manual exports.

faqs.question: Can GAIA backfill historical Stripe data into Notion?
faqs.answer: Yes. During setup, GAIA can import existing Stripe customers and past payment records into Notion so your database starts populated with historical data.

faqs.question: How frequently does GAIA update the Notion revenue dashboard?
faqs.answer: GAIA updates the dashboard on a schedule you configure — hourly, daily, or on every Stripe event. Real-time updates are available for critical metrics like new subscriptions.

faqs.question: Is sensitive billing data stored in Notion?
faqs.answer: GAIA lets you choose which Stripe fields to sync to Notion. Payment method details and full card numbers are never synced — only business-relevant data like plan and amount.

airtable-slack.tagline: Post Airtable record updates to Slack and create records from chat
airtable-slack.metaTitle: Airtable + Slack Automation - Database Meets Team Chat | GAIA
airtable-slack.metaDescription: Connect Airtable and Slack with GAIA. Get Airtable record update notifications in Slack channels and create new Airtable records directly from Slack messages.
airtable-slack.intro:
Airtable bases hold structured data for projects, CRMs, inventories, and more, but changes to that data go unnoticed by teammates who are active in Slack. Important record updates — a deal moving to closed, a task marked complete, an inventory item hitting zero — need to surface in chat where the team can act on them.

GAIA connects Airtable and Slack bidirectionally. Record changes in Airtable trigger formatted Slack notifications in the right channel, and Slack messages can create or update Airtable records without the sender ever opening a browser tab. Data flows where the team lives.

useCases.title: Record status change notifications in Slack
useCases.description: When an Airtable record status field changes — a deal closes, a task completes, a request is approved — GAIA posts a Slack notification to the relevant channel. Teams act on changes the moment they happen.

useCases.title: Create Airtable records from Slack messages
useCases.description: Team members use a simple Slack command or message format to create Airtable records from chat. Leads, tasks, and requests captured in conversation are immediately stored in the right base.

useCases.title: New record alerts for intake workflows
useCases.description: When a new record is added to an Airtable form or base, GAIA notifies the responsible Slack channel. Intake requests, bug reports, and form submissions are actioned quickly.

useCases.title: Daily Airtable summary digests in Slack
useCases.description: GAIA posts a morning digest of key Airtable metrics — open tasks, pipeline value, pending requests — to the team Slack channel. Everyone starts the day with the same data.

howItWorks.step: Connect Airtable and Slack to GAIA
howItWorks.description: Authorize GAIA with your Airtable account and Slack workspace. GAIA links your Airtable bases and views to the relevant Slack channels.

howItWorks.step: Configure trigger fields and message formats
howItWorks.description: Define which Airtable field changes trigger Slack messages and how those messages are formatted. GAIA uses your Airtable field names to populate notifications with meaningful context.

howItWorks.step: GAIA automates database-to-chat notifications
howItWorks.description: Airtable record changes produce formatted Slack messages in real time, and Slack commands create Airtable records instantly. Both tools stay in sync without manual updates.

faqs.question: Can I filter notifications to only specific Airtable views?
faqs.answer: Yes. GAIA can scope notifications to records that match a specific Airtable view filter. Only records relevant to a team's context appear in their Slack channel.

faqs.question: Which Airtable field types can trigger Slack notifications?
faqs.answer: GAIA supports triggers on single select, status, checkbox, date, and linked record field changes. You configure the specific fields and values that are meaningful.

faqs.question: Can Slack notifications include linked record data from related tables?
faqs.answer: Yes. GAIA can pull in linked record fields and roll-up values to include in Slack notifications, giving recipients complete context from related tables.

airtable-notion.tagline: Sync data between Airtable bases and Notion databases seamlessly
airtable-notion.metaTitle: Airtable + Notion Automation - Sync Your Databases | GAIA
airtable-notion.metaDescription: Connect Airtable and Notion with GAIA. Sync records bidirectionally between Airtable bases and Notion databases and keep structured data consistent across both tools.
airtable-notion.intro:
Teams often use Airtable for structured data management and Notion for documentation and project planning, resulting in duplicate data entry when the same information needs to live in both tools. A CRM record updated in Airtable never reflects in the Notion client page, and tasks added to a Notion project database don't appear in the Airtable operations tracker.

GAIA syncs Airtable and Notion so data flows automatically between both systems. Record updates in Airtable propagate to the corresponding Notion database entries, and Notion page status changes update the linked Airtable records. Teams maintain one source of truth without choosing between the two tools they rely on.

useCases.title: Sync Airtable CRM records to Notion client pages
useCases.description: When a client record is updated in Airtable, GAIA updates the corresponding Notion client page with the latest status, owner, and notes. Both tools reflect the same information without duplicate entry.

useCases.title: Mirror Notion project tasks to Airtable
useCases.description: Tasks created in a Notion project database are automatically added to the Airtable operations base. Operations teams track all work in Airtable while project managers work in Notion.

useCases.title: Sync status fields bidirectionally
useCases.description: Status changes in Airtable flow to the linked Notion database record and vice versa. Teams working in either tool always see current status without manual reconciliation.

useCases.title: Aggregate Airtable data in Notion dashboards
useCases.description: GAIA pulls summary metrics from Airtable — counts, sums, averages — and updates Notion dashboard pages daily. Leadership sees live operational data inside their Notion workspace.

howItWorks.step: Connect Airtable and Notion to GAIA
howItWorks.description: Authorize GAIA with your Airtable account and Notion workspace. GAIA maps Airtable table fields to Notion database properties for each sync pair you configure.

howItWorks.step: Configure field mappings and sync direction
howItWorks.description: Define which fields sync between Airtable and Notion and whether sync is one-way or bidirectional. GAIA handles field type translation between the two platforms.

howItWorks.step: GAIA automates cross-platform data sync
howItWorks.description: Record changes in either platform are mirrored to the other according to your mappings. Data stays consistent without anyone manually updating two systems.

faqs.question: How does GAIA handle field type differences between Airtable and Notion?
faqs.answer: GAIA translates common field types automatically — Airtable select fields map to Notion select properties, Airtable dates map to Notion date properties. Custom mappings are available for edge cases.

faqs.question: Can GAIA sync Airtable attachments to Notion?
faqs.answer: Yes. Airtable attachment fields can be synced to Notion file and media properties. Files are transferred and linked so both records reference the same assets.

faqs.question: Does bidirectional sync risk creating duplicate records?
faqs.answer: No. GAIA assigns unique identifiers to synced records and tracks origin to prevent duplication. Records updated in either tool update their counterpart rather than creating a new entry.

airtable-google-calendar.tagline: Sync Airtable date fields to Google Calendar events automatically
airtable-google-calendar.metaTitle: Airtable + Google Calendar Sync - Dates Become Events | GAIA
airtable-google-calendar.metaDescription: Connect Airtable and Google Calendar with GAIA. Turn Airtable date fields into Google Calendar events, keep deadlines visible, and sync changes in real time.
airtable-google-calendar.intro:
Airtable bases are rich with date fields — project deadlines, content publish dates, event schedules, campaign launches — but those dates sit inside Airtable where they're invisible to anyone who manages their time in Google Calendar. Important deadlines get missed because they never made it onto anyone's calendar.

GAIA bridges Airtable and Google Calendar by turning Airtable date records into Google Calendar events automatically. When a deadline is added or changed in Airtable, the corresponding calendar event is created or updated in real time. Your Airtable schedule becomes a live calendar that the whole team can see and act on.

useCases.title: Turn Airtable project deadlines into calendar events
useCases.description: Every date field in your Airtable project tracker creates a Google Calendar event with the record name and a link back to Airtable. Deadlines are visible on everyone's calendar automatically.

useCases.title: Content calendar sync to Google Calendar
useCases.description: Publish dates from an Airtable content calendar appear as Google Calendar events for the content team. Writers and editors see their schedule in the calendar they live in.

useCases.title: Event management scheduling
useCases.description: Event records in Airtable — with venue, time, and organizer — generate detailed Google Calendar events with full descriptions. Event teams plan in Airtable and calendar invites are sent automatically.

useCases.title: Deadline change propagation
useCases.description: When a due date is pushed in Airtable, GAIA updates the Google Calendar event immediately. No one attends a meeting for a deadline that has already moved.

howItWorks.step: Connect Airtable and Google Calendar to GAIA
howItWorks.description: Authorize GAIA with your Airtable account and Google Calendar. GAIA identifies the date fields and tables you want to sync to calendar events.

howItWorks.step: Map Airtable fields to calendar event properties
howItWorks.description: Define which Airtable fields populate the event title, description, location, and attendees. GAIA uses your field mappings to create well-structured calendar events.

howItWorks.step: GAIA automates date-to-event synchronization
howItWorks.description: New and updated Airtable dates create or modify Google Calendar events in real time. Your calendar always reflects the latest schedule from Airtable.

faqs.question: Can GAIA sync to specific Google Calendars, not just the primary?
faqs.answer: Yes. During setup you choose which Google Calendar receives events from each Airtable table. Different tables can populate different calendars — a content calendar and a project calendar, for example.

faqs.question: Does GAIA add Google Meet links to calendar events?
faqs.answer: Yes. GAIA can optionally add a Google Meet link to each generated calendar event, making it easy to schedule virtual meetings directly from Airtable records.

faqs.question: What happens if an Airtable record is deleted?
faqs.answer: When an Airtable record is deleted, GAIA removes the corresponding Google Calendar event. Your calendar stays clean and only reflects active Airtable records.
